title: Establishment of patient-derived enteroids/colonoids from endoscopic biopsies
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eq5hn","text":"This protocol describes the full procedure of generating an enteroid or colonoid culture from endoscopic biopsy (either freshly procured or recovered from cryopreservation), was developed for human tissue, but works equally well for murine tissue fragments.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Tatiana Karakasheva
